display.purpose: Hero title only — Bebas Neue, towering, +0.06em tracking.

label.purpose: Buttons/tags/chips: tiny, heavy, wide-tracked uppercase Barlow.

shadows.name: ambient-lift
shadows.purpose: Floating chrome (modals, drawers, tab bar) above the page.

shadows.name: blood-glow
shadows.purpose: Red elements announcing liveness (WA button, live chips, charged CTAs). Signal, never decoration.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The blood-red CTA — chamfered, uppercase, tracked.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #DC1111; color: #f0ece4; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 1rem 2.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 0; clip-path: polygon(10px 0, 100% 0, 100% calc(100% - 10px), calc(100% - 10px) 100%, 0 100%, 0 10px); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.22s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), transform 0.12s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #ff2222; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #DC1111; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #f0ece4; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 1rem 2.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.22s, border-color 0.22s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(220,17,17,0.12); border-color: rgba(220,17,17,0.5); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #DC1111; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Two-path availability: Stock CR (green) vs Encargo (red).
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.3rem 0.65rem; border-radius: 0; } .ds-chip-stock { background: rgba(40,180,80,0.12); color: #4ade80; border: 1px solid rgba(40,180,80,0.35); } .ds-chip-encargo { background: rgba(220,17,17,0.12); color: #ff6b6b; border: 1px solid rgba(220,17,17,0.35); }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Tonal-step card with hairline border; red charges on hover.
components.html:
YOUNGLA

OVERSIZED TEE — NIGHT

₡18 500
components.css: .ds-card { width: 240px; background: #090909; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: border-color 0.32s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), transform 0.32s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(220,17,17,0.4); transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-card-img { height: 150px; background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0e0e0e 0%, #1a1a1a 100%); } .ds-card-body { padding: 1rem; } .ds-card-brand { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 0.55rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: #82827a; } .ds-card-name { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #f0ece4; margin: 0.35rem 0; } .ds-card-price { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #d4d0c8; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Uppercase nav item with red underline draw.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { position: relative; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #d4d0c8; text-decoration: none; padding: 0.5rem 0; transition: color 0.22s; } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: 0; width: 100%; height: 1px; background: #DC1111; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 0.32s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #f0ece4; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Flat dark well; red focus shift.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #090909; color: #d4d0c8; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; padding: 0.85rem 1rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 0; width: 260px; transition: border-color 0.22s, box-shadow 0.22s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #82827a; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(220,17,17,0.6); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(220,17,17,0.12); }

narrative.overview: Gym-wear presented as armor in a night forge: vast near-black surfaces, one blood-red blade of accent, hard chamfered edges cut with clip-path instead of border-radius, and controlled industrial motion (scanlines, glitch, Ken-Burns drift). Intensity comes from restraint: enormous condensed uppercase type on empty black, with red spent only where it draws blood.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black canvas in three steps (#050505 / #090909 / #0e0e0e), hairline white borders for structure
Single chromatic voice: #DC1111 and its two siblings, nothing else colored
Bebas Neue condensed uppercase display vs. Barlow workhorse body
Chamfered (clip-path) corners as the signature shape language; radius is always 0
Motion is industrial: scan, glitch, drift, stitch — never bounce, never elastic

rules.name: The One Blade Rule
rules.body: Red (#DC1111 family) is the only chroma permitted anywhere. If a design wants a second color, the answer is a different lightness of red or a neutral.

rules.name: The No-Daylight Rule
rules.body: No surface rises above #0e0e0e. Light exists only as text, hairlines, and glow.

rules.name: The All-Caps Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Uppercase lives in display, headlines, and short labels. Body copy is never uppercase.

rules.name: The 0.06em Rule
rules.body: Bebas Neue always gets +0.06em tracking; it is never set tight.

rules.name: The Glow-Is-Meaning Rule
rules.body: Red glow is a signal (live, urgent, actionable), never decoration on static elements.

dos: Do keep the page ≥90% neutral (Abyss + Ash + Bone) and spend red like ammunition.
Do cut corners with clip-path chamfers on signature elements (cards, CTAs, badges).
Do ship a prefers-reduced-motion alternative for every loop and reveal, no exceptions.
Do judge every change at 375px first — mobile is the storefront.
Do make Stock CR vs Encargo status legible on every product surface (green vs red chips).
Do use the canonical motion scale (--t-instant 0.12s → --t-cinematic 0.8s, --ease-out/--ease-emph) for all new motion.
donts: Don't introduce any hue besides the red family — no purple, cyan, gold, or premium gradients (red is blood, not laser).
Don't use border-radius anywhere; rounded corners are off-brand (chamfer or hard edge).
Don't reach for SaaS grammar: gradient text, metric-card heroes, cream backgrounds, icon-above-heading grids.
Don't stack fake-urgency widgets or discount stickers.
Don't use serifs or italic editorial type anywhere.
Don't animate layout properties in new motion; transform/opacity/clip-path only, and never bounce/elastic easing.
